tasks.label: unblock-my-server-port
args: port=${config:my.ports.server}; if command -v lsof >/dev/null 2>&1; then pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$port 2>/dev/null || true); elif command -v fuser >/dev/null 2>&1; then pids=$(fuser -n tcp $port 2>/dev/null || true); else pids=; fi; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "Killing PID(s) $pids using port $port"; kill -9 $pids 2>/dev/null || true; else echo "Port $port is free"; fi

$port=${config:my.ports.server}; $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $pids = $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { try { $p = Get-Process -Id $pid -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Killing PID $pid ($($p.ProcessName)) using port $port"; Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force; } catch { Write-Host "Could not kill PID $pid" } } } else { Write-Host "Port $port is free" }
